notes.advancement: A stage's status becomes 'ready_for_founder_review' only when its draft PR is fully implemented and validated. It is added to completedStages, and nextStage advances, only after a later routine run detects that stage's branch has been merged into origin/main. Stage 10 completion sets nextStage to null.
notes.autoMergeProhibition: autoMerge is always false. The routine must never merge, mark-ready-and-merge, or enable auto-merge on any PR it opens.
